title: ATID-437 I Was Talking With My Co-Worker At My Part-Time Job About The Time I Got Fucked By An Old Guy Who Was Older Than My Dad, And He Seemed Really Jealous, So... Yukina Shida
description: Food poisoning occurred at a small restaurant where Yukina works, and she was suspended from business. Although we managed to resume business, the damage caused by rumors was more than expected and the number of customers dropped sharply. Most of the employees have left, leaving only Yukina and Cook Kawakami in charge of the hall. One day, Yukina is entrusted with training for newly hired hall staff. However, the newcomer was a middle-aged restructuring man who was older than Yukina's father ...
